M-010.NAME: frontend-admin
M-010.owns: admin login, mobile-capable dashboard, users, devices, MTProto operations, servers, plans, analytics, settings, Full Tunnel status, and device anomaly review controls

phase-25-scope.surface-1: Admin login persists admin_refresh_token so the existing 401 refresh interceptor can operate.
phase-25-scope.surface-2: Admin logout and setToken(null) clear admin_refresh_token together with admin_token.

phase-33-scope.surface-1: Compact /mtproto admin page renders redacted assignment rows and runtime health.
phase-33-scope.surface-2: Reissue and revoke actions use explicit confirmation and call M-047 endpoints only.
phase-33-scope.surface-3: Admin navigation exposes MTProto without changing deploy/install or public edge surfaces.

phase-24-scope.surface-1: Compact mobile admin shell and overview.
phase-24-scope.surface-2: Mobile-safe users and devices pages without table-only primary workflows.
phase-24-scope.surface-3: Confirmation-safe device actions using existing M-024 admin endpoints.
phase-24-scope.surface-4: Analytics/payment/system summaries that remain readable on phone viewports.

constraints.constraint-1: Frontend-admin must continue to call existing M-006 and M-024 API contracts unless an API change is separately approved.
constraints.constraint-2: Admin auth/session hardening belongs to Phase-25 and must not be bundled into Phase-24 UI simplification.
constraints.constraint-3: Deployment and install scripts are out of scope for this UI module phase.
constraints.constraint-4: Admin login inputs must not prefill or hint stale default credentials; icon-bearing inputs must reserve enough padding so icons and placeholder text never overlap.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-05-21: Local admin UI fix removed login email/password placeholders, removed stale admin@krotpn.com fallback copy, and standardized left-icon input padding.
